title: とげとげベイビーローズ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Passing by the library, I catch a glimpse of Sweep Tosho combing the
shelves for something.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I found it! This is definitely it. I knew I saw it the last time I was here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph, Grandma tells me that all the time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: More importantly, I gotta hurry before she catches up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Thorns, o thorns, entwine! ☆

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: I've finally found you, Sweep Tosho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What gives?! Why isn't my ensnaring spell working?!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see your trainer is with you as well. Let me explain.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho didn't do her homework, and when I tried to get her to
attend makeup lessons, she ran away.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Of course I did! Who would want to stay at school for that?! If I don't wanna, I don't wanna!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, why isn't my spell working?! I'm sure I followed all the steps
in this book!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho, hear me out. I'm not giving you homework so you have
more busywork to do.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
In your future as a competitor, balancing training with your studies
will be very important. That's why I'm giving you homework now, so
you can get used to it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Blah blah blah—who are you to give me orders?! If I don't wanna, I'm
not gonna!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, these two have forgotten to use their inside voices. Sensing
the judging stares of those around us, I realize it's my time to
intervene.
choice_data_list:
Sorry for the trouble. Perhaps I could talk to
Sweep if you don't mind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back in my office, I suggest to Sweep Tosho that maybe doing her
homework wouldn't be so bad. Heck, it might even be fun!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Homework, schomework—even my familiar's getting on my case now! I
thought you were helping me by getting that teacher outta my hair!
choice_data_list: You can't just not do your homework.
You can't just not do your homework.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Then why don't you do it for me, familiar?!
choice_data_list: You know I can't do that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And why not?! A familiar HAS to listen to their master, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no stopping her once she's throwing a tantrum. She's
completely honest with her feelings, and has no patience for things
she isn't interested in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a sudden flash of genius, I recall a recent moment when she showed
a liking to something.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I found it! This is definitely it. I knew I saw it the last time I was here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, what're you all quiet for?
choice_data_list:
Why don't you just do your homework with
magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You mean like writing the answers with magic? Hmm, you might
be onto something.
choice_data_list:
I guess that could work, but what about casting
a spell on yourself?

I guess that could work, but what about casting
a spell on yourself?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Casting a spell on myself? Explain, familiar.
choice_data_list:
You know, like a spell to help you solve
problems faster!

You know, like a spell to help you solve
problems faster!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that just extra steps though? So basically... you want me to cast a
speed spell, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well... whatever. Sounds kinda fun! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Spell well—excel! Alstroemeria! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now for the first problem... Wow, it really is a piece of cake
now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if truly enchanted, Sweep begins to plow through her homework at
an impressive pace.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
For this problem... Urgh, I can feel my speed dropping! "Solve like the
wind! Alstroemeria! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can't believe I'm already done! Do you see now, familiar? This
is the power of Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she makes up her mind to do something, she really does do it
better than anyone else.
choice_data_list: Your magic is out of this world!
Your magic is out of this world!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, praise me more! I can't wait to shut that teacher up! C'mon, let's
go find her—I bet she'll be shocked!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
A perfect score. Good grief, I knew you could do it if you applied
yourself, so please stop running away all the time. Also...

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer helped you, right? Make sure to say thank you later,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Geeeeez! She should've been stunned by my magic—not fawning over
my familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
In any case, with magic on my side, homework is a problem of the
past. Goodbye extra lessons, hello freedom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says that, her eyes light up with newfound motivation. When it
comes to doing what she loves, you won't find a harder worker than
Sweep Tosho.
